Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: trousers [300209935], main garments for the lower body [300209279], main garments [300209263], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Trousers of heavy, twilled fabric, especially cotton denim.
Pantalones de tejido fuerte y cruzado, especialmente algodón mahón.
Broeken van zware keperstof, vooral katoenen denim, vaak blauw, waarvan sommige delen zoals b.v. de zakken bij de hoeken worden versterkt met klinknagels.
Hose aus schwerem, geripptem Material, vor allem Baumwoll-Denim.
用厚重斜紋布（主要是丹寧棉布）所製成的褲子。

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
